# Auras Technology — Thermal Modules for NVL72
Last updated: 2026-04-01

## Company Overview
- **HQ:** New Taipei City, Taiwan
- Listed on Taiwan OTC market (3289.TWO)
- Revenue: ~$150-250M USD annually
- Specialty: heat pipes, vapor chambers, thermal modules, liquid cooling components
- Customers include Foxconn, Quanta, Inventec, Compal (major server ODMs)

## Role in NVL72 Supply Chain
- Auras supplies **vapor chambers and thermal modules** used inside compute trays
- Expanding into liquid cooling: cold plates, heat exchanger elements, manifold sub-assemblies
- NVL72 Tray Inner Manifold: Auras likely supplies the vapor chamber layer between GPU module and cold plate, and potentially the manifold flow distribution structure
- Post-2024: Auras has invested heavily in liquid cooling capacity as vapor chamber demand grows alongside cold plate demand

## Products Relevant to NVL72
- Vapor chambers (large-area, high-power GPU applications)
- Heat pipe assemblies
- Liquid cold plates (expanding product line)
- Thermal modules (integrated vapor chamber + fin stack)

## ADC Relevance
- Auras = thermal interface layer inside the tray, between GPU die and the liquid cooling loop
- Vapor chamber supply = potential constraint as GB300 demand scales
- Not a direct ADC vendor — supply chain intelligence

## URLs
- auras.com.tw

## Confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH (Auras thermal component role in server ODM chain is documented; liquid cooling expansion is recent)
